title: Aspidogyne nobilis
taxonomy: Aspidogyne nobilis is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Aspidogyne and is native to tropical regions. The species name 'nobilis' suggests its unique characteristics and distinction within the genus. Aspidogyne nobilis is further classified as a terrestrial orchid, which grows on the ground. Its classification as a terrestrial orchid highlights its adaptation to a specific environment.
uses: Aspidogyne nobilis is a species of orchid, but information on its specific medicinal uses is limited.
